title: Vance Blames Migrant ‘Invasion’ for UK Stabbing
summary_full: British officials accused Vice President JD Vance of trying to “stir up division” in his comments on the murder of Henry Nowak, whose killer was sentenced to life in prison last week.
summary_public: British officials accused Vice President JD Vance of trying to “stir up division” in his comments on the murder of Henry Nowak, whose killer was sentenced to life in prison last week.

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: Vance Blames Migrant ‘Invasion’ for UK Stabbing
